---
title: "Protocol v0.1"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Objective

Lock the analysis protocol before modeling.

# Dataset roles

- Discovery / nested CV: pending metadata audit
- External validation: pending metadata audit

# Leakage-control rules

All preprocessing, supervised feature selection, class handling, and hyperparameter tuning must be inside training folds.

# Primary outputs

- Leakage inflation gap
- Nested CV performance
- Feature-stability metrics
- External validation performance
- Reproducible Omics Evidence Audit
